commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b14f5bd9e01a3f04b02ebaedad563a2588ffe816)
commands.review_summary:
Adds a built-in W&B/CoreWeave Sandboxes delegated-run provider with native Go gRPC client code, vendored v1beta2 protos, config/env/flags, docs, unit tests, and an opt-in live smoke test.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR rather than a bug report. The remaining actionable issue is source-verifiable by comparing resolveAuth's ~/.netrc fallback with the provider docs' three-item credential list.
commands.review_followup: A human maintainer should decide whether to accept W&B/CoreWeave v1beta2 as core surface; the remaining docs mismatch is mechanical but not the only merge consideration.

target.title: feat(wandb): native gRPC sandbox provider (W&B by CoreWeave)
target.body:
## Summary

Adds the **W&B Sandboxes** provider (`provider: wandb`, alias `weights-and-biases`) — [Weights & Biases](https://wandb.ai/) sandboxes, now operated by CoreWeave post-2025 acquisition. Native Go gRPC client against `coreweave.sandbox.v1beta2`; no Python in the binary.

The reason this provider matters: it accepts the `WANDB_API_KEY` an ML engineer already has in `~/.netrc` from `wandb login`. For users already on W&B, that's zero new accounts, zero new credentials, zero billing setup.

> Replaces the Python-shim approach from the previous revision of this PR. The shim is gone — addresses [@steipete's review comment](https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/pull/132#issuecomment-4512957072) directly. Force-pushed to a clean commit history.

## What changed (vs. the previous revision)

| Was | Is now |
|---|---|
| 194-line embedded Python shim (`shim/wandb_sandbox.py`) | Deleted |
| `//go:embed` + `python3` subprocess per call | Direct gRPC over `api.cwsandbox.com:443` |
| `pip install 'wandb[sandbox]'` required on the host | Not required (Python is no longer a runtime dep) |
| `--wandb-python` flag selecting an interpreter | Removed (defunct) |
| Direct `os.Getenv(\"WANDB_API_KEY\")` check (silently bypassed `CRABBOX_WANDB_API_KEY`) | Fixed: precedence `CRABBOX_WANDB_API_KEY` → `cfg.Wandb.APIKey` → `WANDB_API_KEY` in `resolveAuth()` |
| Doctor: SemVer check of the Python SDK, custom \"cli=ready\" shape | Matches modal/e2b/runpod: probe + List + `inventoryDoctorResult` |

## Commit map

1. `proto(wandb): vendor coreweave.sandbox.v1beta2 + generate Go stubs` — protos from `buf.build/coreweave/sandbox`, googleapis pinned in `buf.lock`.
2. `feat(wandb): native gRPC sandbox provider (W&B by CoreWeave)` — the rewrite.
3. `test(wandb): unit coverage + opt-in live smoke against the gateway` — `fakeWandbAPI` seam + `-tags smoke` live target.
4. `docs(wandb): provider README + index entries (W&B by CoreWeave)` — provider doc + index updates.
5. `refactor(wandb): align Doctor with the inventory-style native providers` — drop shim-era cruft (-65 lines).

## Verified end-to-end against the live API

```
=== RUN   TestSmokeVersionAndExec
    client_smoke_test.go:42: connected; api version = coreweave.sandbox.v1beta2
=== RUN   TestSmokeVersionAndExec/AcquireExecStop
    client_smoke_test.go:58: acquired sandbox id=3ad3da87-... status=SANDBOX_STATUS_RUNNING
    client_smoke_test.go:81: exec exit=0 stdout=\"hello-from-crabbox\\nuid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)\\n\"
    client_smoke_test.go:66: stopped sandbox 3ad3da87-...
--- PASS: TestSmokeVersionAndExec (5.84s)
```

Repeat on your end (any wandb.ai account with sandbox access):
```sh
export CRABBOX_WANDB_API_KEY=...                    # or `wandb login` once
go test -tags smoke -run TestSmokeVersionAndExec -v ./internal/providers/wandb/
```

## Design notes

- **Transport:** gRPC over HTTP/2 + TLS. Default endpoint `api.cwsandbox.com:443`, overridable via `CWSANDBOX_BASE_URL` (matches upstream cwsandbox client).
- **Auth:** three gRPC metadata headers — `x-wandb-api-key` (required), `x-entity-id`, `x-project-name` — injected via a single `grpc.WithUnaryInterceptor`.
- **Connection lifecycle:** one long-lived `*grpc.ClientConn` per backend instance (HTTP/2 multiplexes); pool sizing left for the future `--parallel` work.
- **Billing safety:** default `max_lifetime_seconds = 1800` (30 min). Surfaced as `--wandb-max-lifetime`.
- **Error mapping:** gRPC `codes.*` → typed `*wandbAPIError` with sysexits.h-aligned exit codes (`77 EX_NOPERM`, `69 EX_UNAVAILABLE`, `124` GNU timeout).
- **Message-size cap:** raised to 128 MiB on send/recv (default 4 MiB trips `RetrieveFile`).
- **Keepalive:** 30s/10s with `PermitWithoutStream` for NAT/LB resilience between commands.
- **Deferred:** `StreamExec` (bidi PTY) and `StreamLogs` (server stream) — unary `Exec` covers v1; PTY arrives once we wire it through crabbox's terminal layer.

## Test plan

- [x] `go build ./...` clean
- [x] `go vet ./...` clean
- [x] `go test -short ./...` green (whole module, not just wandb)
- [x] Live smoke `Acquire → Exec → Stop` against `api.cwsandbox.com:443` — ~6 s cycle, exit 0, root in container
- [x] Credential precedence `CRABBOX_WANDB_API_KEY > cfg.Wandb.APIKey > WANDB_API_KEY` exercised
- [x] Doctor follows the inventory shape used by modal/e2b/runpod

## Risk register

| Risk | Mitigation |
|---|---|
| `v1beta2` protos rename / restructure | Pinned via `buf.lock`; `buf generate` is reproducible |
| Public preview gating (invite-only on Serverless path) | README names the access path (`support@coreweave.com`) |
| Unpublished pricing | Default `max_lifetime_seconds = 1800` caps surprise bills |
| Single `ClientConn` HOL blocking under high parallelism | Documented; pool when `--parallel` lands |
| 100 MB unary `AddFile` cap | README recommends `S3Mount` at `Start` for trees > 99 MB |
